title: 12 Pcs Happy Mother's Day Foil Balloons, 18 inch Balloon for Mother's Day, Heart Balloons Decorations, Mothers Day Balloon for Mothers Day Birthday Party Supplies
features: QUALITY MATERIAL: Mother's Day balloons are made of aluminium foil, durable and reusable, can be filled with air or helium, the appearance of painted spring flowers will attract everyone's interest.

CUTE DESIGN: These aluminium foil mother's day party balloons come in a variety of designs, the cute appearance will make your party more interesting and reusable, leaving you a memorable and deep experience.

CELEBRATE OCCASIONS: you can use these beautiful balloons as decorations to create a joyful atmosphere, also can be used as a perfect photo backdrop or photo props, perfect for mother's day, birthday party, mum theme party, best mum party ever and other cheerful occasions.

HOW TO USE: Once inflated, just pinch the mouth of the balloon and the adhesive will automatically seal it, easy to blow and seal, easy to inflate and deflate, floats for a long time, can be placed in doorways or on ceilings and walls.
Package content: you will get a total of 12 balloons; 12 different designs of balloons, each design contains 1 balloon; and a roll of ribbon and 1 straw; all balloons measure: 18 inches.
